title: Swarm launcher repo intake + new backlog items
policy: Static, planning-only intake for swarm/agent-launching repo candidates and new backlog items. A URL is recorded only when it is already verified in this repo's prior intake or is confidently known; otherwise source_needed is true and source_url is null (never guessed). Operator-provided repo handles are kept as plain strings in operator_handle and still require verification. Nothing here is installed, cloned, executed, or launched. The eventual swarm launcher is gated behind a separate, audited, human-approved controlled-launcher milestone and is dry-run-first.

swarm_candidates.name: ClawTeam
swarm_candidates.notes: Operator-named swarm/team orchestrator. Exact repo unverified; operator must supply the URL before any intake. Static inspection only; no install, no launch.

swarm_candidates.name: swarms (operator handle am-will/swarms)
swarm_candidates.notes: Operator-provided handle am-will/swarms (kept as a string, not a fabricated URL). A widely known multi-agent 'swarms' framework exists under a different owner; do not assume they are the same. Verify the exact repo/owner/license before intake. Study orchestration patterns only; no install, no agent launch.

swarm_candidates.name: multiswarm-style worktree orchestrator
swarm_candidates.notes: Concept: a git-worktree-per-agent orchestrator (one branch/worktree per agent task, like Ghoti already does manually). No single verified repo; collect references. Maps directly to the controlled-launcher stage.

swarm_candidates.name: ECC multi-agent / commands references
swarm_candidates.notes: ECC = Everything Claude Code. URL is from prior intake (ecc_inspired_agent_setup_n6_19a.md), confidence medium; re-verify repo/license. Use the agents/commands subset as reference patterns for spawn-a-worker; do NOT install hooks. See ECC_EVERYTHING_CLAUDE_CODE_N6_24A.md.

swarm_candidates.name: Claude Code team / subagent patterns
swarm_candidates.notes: Claude Code subagent / Task-tool fan-out pattern (a coordinator spawning workers with their own context). The capability is real and used manually in this repo's tooling; the exact official documentation URL should be recorded. No fabricated URL.

swarm_candidates.name: Codex skill agent-launching pattern
swarm_candidates.notes: A Codex skill that launches/coordinates other agents (conductor pattern), not just audits. Spec/source to verify. Same risk surface as the controlled launcher; dry-run-first when eventually built. See CODEX_AGENTS_AND_SKILLS_N6_24A.md.

swarm_candidates.name: Existing backlog coordinators (kimi+claude swarms, awesome-llm-apps)
swarm_candidates.notes: Existing N+6.22A backlog entries that can coordinate agents: 'Kimi + Claude swarms research' (source_needed) and 'awesome-llm-apps' (verified collection of examples). Reuse those, do not duplicate. awesome-llm-apps URL lives in tool_backlog_inventory_n6_22a.json.

new_backlog_items.name: Sentry Search
new_backlog_items.notes: Operator flagged as not a priority. Search/observability-adjacent; exact project unverified. Deferred.

new_backlog_items.name: Panopticore
new_backlog_items.notes: Ambiguous name; operator must supply the exact URL. Monitoring/observability-adjacent guess only; not assumed.

new_backlog_items.name: cobalt.tools
new_backlog_items.blocked_reason: Media/content saver. Any content-saving capability is gated and out of current scope (licensing/ToS and platform-policy concerns). Static inspection of the project's design only; no saving/processing of third-party media.
new_backlog_items.notes: Verify the exact repo/license. Treat as study-only; the saver capability stays off until a separate, audited milestone clears licensing and scope.

new_backlog_items.name: Claude Mem
new_backlog_items.notes: Memory layer for Claude (tier 1.5). Exact repo unverified. Relevant to Ghoti's memory vault + compact memory; static-inspect first, no secrets, no install.

new_backlog_items.name: AIEngineer Coach
new_backlog_items.notes: Coaching/learning assistant concept for AI engineering. Exact source unverified. Deferred; planning-only.

new_backlog_items.name: Quant Mind
new_backlog_items.blocked_reason: Finance/quant-adjacent. Any live trading, orders, or money movement is blocked. Research / paper-only at most.
new_backlog_items.notes: Study the design only; no market actions, no money movement, no account/keys.

new_backlog_items.name: Pake
new_backlog_items.notes: Turns web pages into lightweight desktop apps. Operator-style handle tw93/Pake kept as a string (verify). No build/run here; static-inspect the packaging approach only.

new_backlog_items.name: ChatGPT new memory / dreaming research
new_backlog_items.notes: Research lane: long-term memory + offline consolidation ('dreaming') ideas. No single repo; collect references only. Feeds Ghoti memory design, not a product.

new_backlog_items.name: Zero by Vercel
new_backlog_items.notes: Open email-client project (tier 2). Verify the exact repo/license. Email send/receive is a live action and stays gated; static-inspect the architecture only.

new_backlog_items.name: LLM RAG AI Agents
new_backlog_items.notes: Reference lane for retrieval-augmented LLM agent patterns. Likely a collection/tutorial rather than one repo; gather verified references. Patterns only, no install.

new_backlog_items.name: Ideogram
new_backlog_items.notes: Image-generation product (commercial). Likely API/account-gated; no keys committed, no live calls. Reference for an image-asset lane only.

new_backlog_items.name: Memory Palace / PAO app (future tier-1-last product lane)
new_backlog_items.notes: Operator product idea: a memory-palace / PAO learning app. Future, build-last product lane. Detailed in memory_palace_pao_app_lane_n6_24a.md. Planning-only; camera/LiDAR/device capture is gated behind privacy + consent milestones.
